name: sophia-motor
description: Claude Code skill for the sophia-motor Python library: @tool decorator, MotorConfig, RunTask, subagents, in-process MCP integration, structured output, multi-turn chat, custom adapters (Anthropic / vLLM), security guardrail. Tracks the sophia-motor PyPI package version it was built against; the skill instructs Claude to inspect the installed source for ground truth when defaults differ across versions.
